classes.reasoning: The document explicitly identifies itself as 'CSR-001 — CLINICAL STUDY REPORT' in the title and contains all hallmark sections of a full Clinical Study Report: synopsis table with trial outcomes (MTD, RP2D, DLTs, ORR, DCR), introduction, patient demographics, comprehensive safety tables with TEAEs by grade, pharmacokinetics, efficacy endpoints, and conclusions. The header states 'FINAL REPORT' and includes data cut-off date (15 November 2022) and report preparation details.

trial_title: Phase I Dose-Escalation Study of BRC-471 (Lumitanib) in Advanced Solid Tumours
indication: Advanced Solid Tumours (NSCLC expansion cohort with EGFR mutations)
summary: This is a Clinical Study Report for a Phase I dose-escalation study of BRC-471 (Lumitanib) in advanced solid tumours with NSCLC expansion cohort, protocol BIORCE-ONC-2021-003. The final report presents comprehensive safety, pharmacokinetic, and preliminary efficacy data (data cut-off 15 November 2022), establishing the recommended Phase 2 dose at 200 mg BID with encouraging activity in HER2-amplified patients.
